description.ko: 폭우, 네온 불빛, 미래 기술이 낭만적으로 교차하는 우울하면서도 활기찬 도시 풍경을 포착합니다.
description.en: A melancholic yet vibrant cityscape capturing the romantic intersection of heavy rain, neon lights, and futuristic technology.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of NEON-V, titled 'The Ultraviolet Monsoon.' Towering #1A0033 indigo skyscrapers are linked by sky-bridges pulsing with #FF00FF magenta neon. Massive 3D holographic koi fish swim through the heavy rain, casting #00FFFF cyan light onto wet metallic asphalt. High-speed maglev vehicles leave long #FF6B35 orange light trails cutting through dense, smoky volumetric fog. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, ray-traced puddle reflections, and lens flares from flickering signs. 8k resolution, capturing the romantic and melancholic soul of a futuristic metropolis.
